Article on Trafilatura Testing

Trafilatura is designed to extract the main readable content from a web page while ignoring boilerplate such as navigation, footers, and sidebars.

This second paragraph is here to give the extractor enough text to make a confident decision about what counts as the main body.

A final paragraph with a link to confirm the extractor preserves trailing prose.

This sidebar text must be stripped from the parsed body.
